name: YouTube Analytics
description: Pull channel performance from the YouTube Analytics API: views, watch time, subscribers, retention. Used by the content domain to track which videos earned their reach.
connection: OAuth 2.0 flow with Google. The refresh token lives at ~/.prevail/connectors/youtube-analytics/auth/refresh.token (chmod 600). When that file is missing or the refresh fails, run `prevail connectors youtube-analytics oauth` to walk through the consent flow in your browser.
